relationships.description: Job launching parameters implement the governance decisions defined in deployment-governance
Governance patterns require understanding of check mode, limit, and extra_vars from launching best practices
Troubleshooting patterns use the error classification taxonomy to categorize root causes
Error classification requires the detailed failure patterns documented in troubleshooting guide
When governed launches fail, troubleshooting guide provides the forensic analysis patterns
Post-deployment failures are classified using the error taxonomy

governance.description: Documents related to deployment governance and safe job launching

troubleshooting.description: Documents related to forensic troubleshooting and error classification

navigation_hints.start_governance: Start with aap/deployment-governance.md for risk classification, then load aap/job-launching-best-practices.md for execution parameters
navigation_hints.start_troubleshooting: Start with aap/troubleshooting-jobs.md for event analysis, then load references/error-classification.md for root cause classification
navigation_hints.governance_to_troubleshooting: If governance deployment fails, transition from governance cluster to troubleshooting cluster
